name: python3-duckpy
title: python3-duckpy
summary: simple Python library for searching on DuckDuckGo
description:
simple Python library for searching on DuckDuckGo
A simple Python module for searching on DuckDuckGo. And also provide an
asynchronous version inside the duckpy.aio package.
.
Can also set up proxies and/or enable or disable random User-Agents
depending on your needs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-duckpy because simple Python library for searching on DuckDuckGo.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-duckpy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-duckpy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-duckpy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
